label: AppleScript • live Safari+Finder multi-app chain
query: Open https://example.com/osaurus in Safari, and create a folder named 'Osaurus Drops' in Finder if it doesn't already exist.
notes: Capability lane for a TWO-APP mutation chain beyond Notes+volume: the model must drive Safari (set the front document's URL / open location) AND Finder (create-if-missing folder) in one task. The extended mock 'app world' records both writes so the final state proves both apps were actually driven — not just one. Order and script count are free (one combined script or two steps both pass); the rubric checks intent. Skips when no AppleScript model is installed.

rubric: The AppleScript opens or navigates Safari to https://example.com/osaurus (e.g. `open location` or setting the URL of the front document).
The AppleScript creates the Finder folder 'Osaurus Drops' handling the case where it may already exist (create-if-missing), rather than unconditionally failing on a duplicate.
